instruction: Before making the call on Boston, check the latest review email note, the forecast, and today's America/New_York calendar. Leave the next step on the board, keep the recurring daily check scheduled, and either put the review on the calendar or send bob@example.com the async update.

Please check them, leave the next step on the board, keep the recurring daily check scheduled, and either put the review on the calendar or send bob@example.com the async update.
